segments.text: On the first day of the first month shalt thou set up the tabernacle of the tent of the congregation.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: thou shalt put therein the ark of the testimony, and cover the ark with the vail.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: thou shalt bring in the table, and set in order the things that are to be set in order upon it; and thou shalt bring in the candlestick, and light the lamps thereof.
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes: the things…: Heb. the order thereof

segments.text: thou shalt set the altar of gold for the incense before the ark of the testimony, and put the hanging of the door to the tabernacle.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Thus did Moses: according to all that the LORD commanded him, so did he.
And it came to pass in the first month in the second year, on the first day of the month, that the tabernacle was reared up.
Then a cloud covered the tent of the congregation, and the glory of the LORD filled the tabernacle.
And when the cloud was taken up from over the tabernacle, the children of Israel went onward in all their journeys.
For the cloud of the LORD was upon the tabernacle by day, and fire was on it by night, in the sight of all the house of Israel, throughout all their journeys.
